name: Arc
summary: Represents the value of a plane, two angles and a radius in a sub-curve of a three-dimensional circle. The curve is parameterized by an angle expressed in radians. For an IsValid arc the total subtended angle AngleRadians() = Domain()(1) - Domain()(0) must satisfy 0 < AngleRadians() < 2*PiThe parameterization of the Arc is inherited from the Circle it is derived from. In particulart -> center + cos(t)*radius*xaxis + sin(t)*radius*yaxiswhere xaxis and yaxis, (part of Circle.Plane) form an orthonormal frame of the plane containing the circle.

constructors.name: Arc(Circle, Interval)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of an arc from a base circle and an interval of angles.

params.name: angleIntervalRadians
params.doc: Increasing angle interval in radians with angleIntervalRadians.Length() <= 2.0*Math.PI.

constructors.name: Arc(Circle, Double)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of an arc from a base circle and an angle.

constructors.name: Arc(Plane, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public Arc(Plane plane, double radius, double angleRadians)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new arc from a base plane, a radius value and an angle.

params.name: plane
params.doc: The plane of the arc (arc center will be located at plane origin)

constructors.name: Arc(Point3d, Point3d, Point3d)
constructors.signature: public Arc(Point3d startPoint, Point3d pointOnInterior, Point3d endPoint)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new arc through three points. If the points are coincident or co-linear, this will result in an Invalid arc.

constructors.name: Arc(Point3d, Vector3d, Point3d)
constructors.signature: public Arc(Point3d pointA, Vector3d tangentA, Point3d pointB)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new arc from end points and a tangent vector. If the tangent is parallel with the line segment between the two endpoints this will result in an Invalid arc.

constructors.name: Arc(Point3d, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public Arc(Point3d center, double radius, double angleRadians)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new horizontal arc at the given center point, with a custom radius and angle.

constructors.name: Arc(Plane, Point3d, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public Arc(Plane plane, Point3d center, double radius, double angleRadians)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new aligned arc at the given center point, with a custom radius and angle.

params.name: plane
params.doc: Alignment plane for arc. The arc will be parallel to this plane.

methods.name: BoundingBox
methods.summary: Computes the 3D axis aligned bounding box for this arc.

methods.name: ClosestParameter
methods.summary: Gets parameter on the arc closest to a test point.

returns.doc: Parameter (in radians) of the point on the arc that is closest to the test point. If testPoint is the center of the arc, then the starting point of the arc is (arc.Domain()[0]) returned. If no parameter could be found, RhinoMath.UnsetValue is returned.

methods.name: ClosestPoint
methods.summary: Computes the point on an arc that is closest to a test point.

returns.doc: The point on the arc that is closest to testPoint. If testPoint is the center of the arc, then the starting point of the arc is returned. UnsetPoint on failure.

methods.name: EpsilonEquals
methods.signature: public bool EpsilonEquals(Arc other, double epsilon)
methods.summary: Check that all values in other are within epsilon of the values in this

methods.name: Equals(Arc)
methods.summary: Determines whether another arc has the same value as this arc.

returns.doc: true if obj is equal to this arc; otherwise false.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Determines whether another object is an arc and has the same value as this arc.

returns.doc: true if obj is an arc and is exactly equal to this arc; otherwise false.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Computes a hash code for the present arc.

returns.doc: A non-unique integer that represents this arc.

methods.name: PointAt
methods.summary: Gets the point at the given arc parameter.

returns.doc: The point at the given parameter.

methods.name: Reverse
methods.summary: Reverses the orientation of the arc. Changes the domain from [a,b] to [-b,-a].

methods.name: TangentAt
methods.summary: Gets the tangent at the given parameter.

returns.doc: The tangent at the arc at the given parameter.

methods.name: ToNurbsCurve()
methods.summary: Initializes a nurbs curve representation of this arc. This amounts to the same as calling NurbsCurve.CreateFromArc().

returns.doc: A nurbs curve representation of this arc or null if no such representation could be made.

methods.name: ToNurbsCurve(Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public NurbsCurve ToNurbsCurve(int degree, int cvCount)
methods.summary: Create a uniform non-rational cubic NURBS approximation of an arc.

returns.doc: NURBS curve approximation of an arc on success

methods.name: Transform
methods.summary: Transforms the arc using a Transformation matrix.

params.name: xform
params.doc: Transformations to apply. Note that arcs cannot handle non-euclidean transformations.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Trim
methods.summary: Sets the arc's angle domain (in radians) to the specified interval, provided it is increasing and its length does not exceed 2.0 * Math.PI (plus a small tolerance). If the interval length exceeds 2.0 * Math.PI it will be clamped to exactly 2.0 * Math.PI. Returns true if the domain was set successfully, false otherwise.

params.name: domain
params.doc: The desired angle domain in radians. Must satisfy domain[0] < domain[1] and domain[1] - domain[0] <= 2.0 * Math.PI + tolerance.

returns.doc: True if the domain was set successfully; false if the interval is not increasing or exceeds the allowed length.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(Arc a, Arc b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two arcs have equal values.

returns.doc: true if all values of the two arcs are exactly equal; otherwise false.

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(Arc a, Arc b)
methods.summary: Determines whether two arcs have different values.

returns.doc: true if any value of the two arcs differ; otherwise false.

properties.name: Angle
properties.summary: Gets or sets the sweep -or subtended- angle (in Radians) for this arc segment.

properties.name: AngleDegrees
properties.summary: Gets or sets the sweep -or subtended- angle (in Degrees) for this arc segment.

properties.name: AngleDomain
properties.summary: Gets or sets the angle domain (in Radians) of this arc.

properties.name: Center
properties.summary: Gets or sets the center point for this arc.

properties.name: Circumference
properties.summary: Gets the circumference of the circle that is coincident with this arc.

properties.name: Diameter
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Diameter of this arc.

properties.name: EndAngle
properties.summary: Gets or sets the end angle (in Radians) for this arc segment.

properties.name: EndAngleDegrees
properties.summary: Gets or sets the end angle (in Degrees) for this arc segment.

properties.name: EndPoint
properties.summary: Gets the end point of the arc.

properties.name: IsCircle
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not this arc is a complete circle.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not this arc is valid. Detail: Radius>0 and 0<AngleRadians()<=2*Math.Pi.

properties.name: Length
properties.summary: Gets the length of the arc. (Length = Radius * (subtended angle in radians)).

properties.name: MidPoint
properties.summary: Gets the mid-point of the arc.

properties.name: Plane
properties.summary: Gets or sets the plane in which this arc lies.

properties.name: Radius
properties.summary: Gets or sets the radius of this arc.

properties.name: StartAngle
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start angle (in Radians) for this arc segment.

properties.name: StartAngleDegrees
properties.summary: Gets or sets the start angle (in Degrees) for this arc segment.

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: Gets the start point of the arc.

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: Gets an Arc with Unset components.
